name: Captain Hookmon
description: Captain Hookmon is a reliable and heroic ship's captain Digimon who commands a pirate ship that cruises the Digital World . It excels in the art of survival, but the duty to support its subordinates weighs heavily on it, and it knows first-hand just how difficult that is. Therefore, it maintains a gentlemanly conduct even when faced with those it dislikes, showing its skill not only at seafaring but also in worldly wisdom. It isn't such a brute as to initiate battles without good reason, but if challenged to a battle it will meet the enemy with all its power. The " Rage Giga Anchor " equipped to its hand expresses Captain Hookmon's intimidating air to its opponents just by being held up, and Captain Hookmon specializes in violent fighting styles that make use of its " Pirate's Punisher ", which has both slashing and gunfire functionality. The " Leg Revolver " fitted to its right leg is a technique suited for surprise attacks, but Captain Hookmon is such a gentleman that it takes it upon itself to give a warning before firing it.
